root.name: Replace IP Address and Port Bullet Points with Diagram on Slide 8
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent removed the bullet points for IP address and port number from slide 8 and replaced them with a simple diagram showing '128.119.245.12' connected to 'Port 80'.

children.name: IP Address and Port Bullet Points Removed
children.description: Verifies that no bullet point mentioning an IP address (128.119.245.12) or port number appears on slide 8.

children.name: Diagram Presence and Content
children.description: Verifies an appropriate diagram is present showing '128.119.245.12' connected to 'Port 80' on slide 8.

children.name: No extraneous changes to other slides or features
children.description: Checks that no unrelated changes were made to slides other than slide 8, or to slide 8's animations/transitions or other features.

children.name: No extraneous text/font changes on other slides
children.description: Checks that text and font properties on slides other than slide 8 were not changed.

children.name: No extraneous changes to animations or transitions on any slide
children.description: Checks that no animation or transition was added, removed, or modified in the presentation.

children.name: No extraneous slides added or removed
children.description: Checks that no slides were added or removed in the presentation.

metadata.task: Slide 8: Replace the IP address and Port number bullet points with a simple diagram showing IP address (128.119.245.12) connected to Port 80
